metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5167
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1: NAPEPLD antibody specificity validation using knockout mice.

Figure 2: immunogold EM imaging of the ventromedial nucleus of the hypothalamus showed NAPEPLD particles at the plasma membrane of both pre- and post-synapses. Labeling was also observed inside the neuronal profiles (Fig. 2f), frequently associated with intracellular organelles such as the smooth endoplasmic reticulum (Fig. 2c).. Experimental description: M&M:
"Six wild-type C57BL/6 N female mice (3-5 month old) were used in this study."

antibody:
polyclonal guinea-pig anti-NAPE-PLD antibody (4 μg/ml, Frontier Science co. Ltd, Shinko-nishi, Ishikari, Hokkaido, Japan)

"Specificity of the NAPE-PLD immunostaining was assessed by the positive control in the hippocampus and in hippocampus of NAPE-PLD knock-out mice.
...
Furthermore, the specificity of the NAPE-PLD antibody has also been confirmed in previous studies (Nyilas et al. 2008; Puente et al. 2011)."
